description: Visual stroke primitives - purely visual patterns, no linguistic knowledge
notes: Primitive IDs are arbitrary labels (P001, P002...). You define what they look like by providing exemplar images.

primitives.visual_description: Single curve, arc shape. Ignore line thickness/ink artifacts.
Two strokes meeting at top, spreading downward. Person/figure shape.
Vertical stroke with horizontal stroke extending right from middle. Inverted T or hook shape.
